app_name_rule: NEVER show 'Task Drop Day Plinko' anywhere in UI or icon. Use generic terms like 'Plan My Day' or 'Daily Drop'.
data_storage: Local storage only (AsyncStorage or SQLite). No backend. No push notifications.

spacing_and_layout.plinko_board: 10 rows of offset pegs. Bottom row has 7 slots. Aspect ratio tailored for mobile vertical screens (roughly 4:5).

motion_and_interactions.ball_drop: Physics-based bouncy drop via react-native-reanimated. Gravity, restitution (bounciness), and random horizontal impulse on peg collision.
motion_and_interactions.full_sprint_hit: Board flashes red, dramatic screen shake, massive red countdown timer scales up.
motion_and_interactions.day_clear: Golden particles/confetti explosion, badge pop-up with a bouncy spring animation.
motion_and_interactions.card_press: Scale down to 0.95 on press-in, release to 1.0.

PlinkoBoard.description: Pyramid board with dark-blue background and glowing white pegs. 7 colored cells at the bottom determining the day format.

PlinkoBall.description: Glowing sphere with a clock inside. Hands tick rapidly while falling.

DayFormatCell.description: Bottom catchers for the ball. Each has a specific color and icon. Glows brightly when the ball lands inside.

TaskCard.description: Bright cartoon flat art card. Large tap target for checkbox. Time-based background color shift.

RiskLevelToggle.description: Switch between Easy and Hardcore probabilities. Alters ball drop trajectory logic.

CountdownTimer.description: Used in Full Sprint. Monospaced massive font, ticks every second.

assets_requirements.instructions: Use AI-generated PNGs (Gemini Nano Banana style) for the following assets.
items: Ball: Glowing sphere with clock inside
Pegs: Individual glowing white peg sprites
FormatCards: Result overlay cards for the 4 modes

testing.attributes: ALL interactive elements must use data-testid (e.g., data-testid='add-task-button', data-testid='drop-ball-button').
